notes: Elite air-superiority specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind, the pure air-combat counterpart to a ground-support/reconnaissance-focused base elsewhere. Its production building fields a fast anti-troop dogfighter and a heavier, missile-armed alternative. Relies on generic defenses plus walls rather than a specialty defense. Generated surrounded by a ring of water, making it harder to approach by land and unreachable by sea, though aircraft ignore the obstacle entirely.
